name: Wooden Pickaxe
description: The lowest tier pickaxe. Can mine stone and coal ore. Crafted from 3 planks and 2 sticks.

name: Stone Pickaxe
description: A pickaxe made from cobblestone. Can mine iron ore and lapis lazuli. Crafted from 3 cobblestone and 2 sticks.

name: Iron Pickaxe
description: A pickaxe made from iron ingots. Can mine diamond ore, redstone ore, and gold ore. Crafted from 3 iron ingots and 2 sticks.

name: Diamond Pickaxe
description: A fast, durable pickaxe. Can mine obsidian. Crafted from 3 diamonds and 2 sticks.

name: Wooden Axe
description: The lowest tier axe. Used to chop wood faster. Crafted from 3 planks and 2 sticks.

name: Stone Axe
description: A basic axe made from cobblestone. Chops wood faster than wooden. Crafted from 3 cobblestone and 2 sticks.

name: Iron Axe
description: A durable iron axe. Chops wood quickly and can be used as a weapon. Crafted from 3 iron ingots and 2 sticks.

name: Diamond Axe
description: A very fast, durable axe. Excellent for chopping wood and combat. Crafted from 3 diamonds and 2 sticks.

name: Wooden Sword
description: The lowest tier sword. Crafted from 2 planks and 1 stick. Deals low damage.

name: Stone Sword
description: A basic sword made from cobblestone. Crafted from 2 cobblestone and 1 stick.

name: Iron Sword
description: A durable iron sword. Good damage and speed. Crafted from 2 iron ingots and 1 stick.

name: Diamond Sword
description: A powerful diamond sword. High damage and durability. Crafted from 2 diamonds and 1 stick.

name: Wooden Shovel
description: A low tier shovel for digging dirt, sand, and gravel. Crafted from 1 plank and 2 sticks.

name: Stone Shovel
description: A basic shovel made from cobblestone. Digs soft blocks faster than wooden. Crafted from 1 cobblestone and 2 sticks.

name: Iron Shovel
description: A durable iron shovel. Digs soft blocks quickly. Crafted from 1 iron ingot and 2 sticks.

name: Diamond Shovel
description: A very fast diamond shovel. Best for digging dirt, sand, and gravel. Crafted from 1 diamond and 2 sticks.

name: Flint and Steel
description: Used to ignite nether portals and TNT. Crafted from 1 iron ingot and 1 flint.

name: Stick
description: Sticks are crafted from 2 planks stacked vertically. Used to make tools, weapons, torches, and many items.

name: Iron Ingot
description: Iron ingots are obtained by smelting iron ore. Used for tools, armor, weapons, buckets, and many blocks.

name: Gold Ingot
description: Gold ingots are obtained by smelting gold ore. Used for powered rails, golden apples, and armor.

name: Diamond
description: Diamonds are rare gems found deep underground. Used for the best tools, armor, weapons, and enchanting tables.

name: Coal
description: Coal is mined from coal ore. Used as furnace fuel and for crafting torches.

name: Charcoal
description: Charcoal is made by smelting wood in a furnace. Functions like coal for fuel and torches.

name: Raw Iron
description: Raw iron is dropped when mining iron ore. It must be smelted in a furnace to become iron ingots.

name: Raw Gold
description: Raw gold is dropped when mining gold ore. It must be smelted in a furnace to become gold ingots.

name: Copper Ingot
description: Copper ingots are obtained by smelting copper ore. Used for copper blocks, lightning rods, and spyglasses.

name: Emerald
description: Emeralds are obtained from mountain ores and villager trading. Used for trading with villagers.

name: Redstone Dust
description: Redstone dust is dropped from redstone ore. Used for circuits, mechanisms, and powered blocks.

name: Lapis Lazuli
description: Lapis lazuli is used for enchanting and blue dye. Obtained from lapis ore.

name: Blaze Rod
description: Blaze rods are dropped by Blazes in Nether fortresses. Used for brewing stands, blaze powder, and eyes of ender.

name: Ender Pearl
description: Ender pearls are dropped by Endermen. Used for crafting eyes of ender and can be thrown to teleport.

name: Eye of Ender
description: Eyes of ender are crafted from blaze powder and ender pearls. Used to locate and activate stronghold End portals.

name: Nether Star
description: The Nether Star is dropped by the Wither. Used to craft beacons.

name: Dragon Egg
description: A decorative trophy dropped by the Ender Dragon upon death. Teleports when touched.

name: Bread
description: Bread is crafted from 3 wheat in a row. Restores hunger and is a reliable early food source.

name: Steak
description: Steak is cooked beef. Restores a lot of hunger and saturation. A top-tier food source.

name: Apple
description: Apples drop from oak leaves and are found in chests. Restore a small amount of hunger.

name: Golden Apple
description: Golden apples are crafted from 8 gold ingots around an apple. Give absorption and regeneration when eaten.

name: Enchanted Golden Apple
description: The strongest food. Gives powerful absorption, regeneration, fire resistance, and resistance. Found in rare loot chests only.

name: Water Bucket
description: A water bucket is made by using a bucket on water. Used for making obsidian, farms, and fall damage protection.

name: Lava Bucket
description: A lava bucket is made by using a bucket on lava. Used as long-lasting furnace fuel and for making obsidian with water.
